'''√l-y-sh''' ('''layasha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pedal|pedal]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-y-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pedal|pedal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √l-y-sh
|-
! Lemma
| layasha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:layashithi|layashithi]] || [[word:layashiji|layashiji]] || [[word:layashishi|layashishi]] || [[word:layashi|layashi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:layashuthuth|layashuthuth]] || [[word:layashujuj|layashujuj]] || [[word:layashushush|layashushush]] || [[word:layash|layash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:layashuthu|layashuthu]] || [[word:layashuju|layashuju]] || [[word:layashushu|layashushu]] || [[word:layashu|layashu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:layashufuth|layashufuth]] || [[word:layashufuj|layashufuj]] || [[word:layashufush|layashufush]] || [[word:layashuf|layashuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:layashethe|layashethe]] || [[word:layasheje|layasheje]] || [[word:layasheshe|layasheshe]] || [[word:layashe|layashe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:layashothoth|layashothoth]] || [[word:layashojoj|layashojoj]] || [[word:layashoshosh|layashoshosh]] || [[word:layash|layash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:layashotho|layashotho]] || [[word:layashojo|layashojo]] || [[word:layashosho|layashosho]] || [[word:layasho|layasho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:layashofoth|layashofoth]] || [[word:layashofoj|layashofoj]] || [[word:layashofosh|layashofosh]] || [[word:layashof|layashof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:layashïf|layashïf]] || [[word:layashïf|layashïf]] || [[word:layashïf|layashïf]] || [[word:layashïf|layashïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:layashïfïf|layashïfïf]] || [[word:layashïfïf|layashïfïf]] || [[word:layashïfïf|layashïfïf]] || [[word:layashïfïf|layashïfïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:layashïf|layashïf]] || [[word:layashïf|layashïf]] || [[word:layashïf|layashïf]] || [[word:layashïf|layashïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:layashïf|layashïf]] || [[word:layashïf|layashïf]] || [[word:layashïf|layashïf]] || [[word:layashïf|layashïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:layashæthæ|layashæthæ]] || [[word:layashæjæ|layashæjæ]] || [[word:layashæshæ|layashæshæ]] || [[word:layashæ|layashæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:layashathath|layashathath]] || [[word:layashajaj|layashajaj]] || [[word:layashashash|layashashash]] || [[word:layash|layash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:layashatha|layashatha]] || [[word:layashaja|layashaja]] || [[word:layashasha|layashasha]] || [[word:layasha|layasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:layashafath|layashafath]] || [[word:layashafaj|layashafaj]] || [[word:layashafash|layashafash]] || [[word:layashaf|layashaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:layashasha|layashasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:golayashasha|golayashasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokilayashasha|gokilayashasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:layashnüsha|layashnüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:golayashnknüsha|golayashnknüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokilayashnüsha|gokilayashnüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:layashshësha|layashshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golayashnkshësha|golayashnkshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilayashshësha|gokilayashshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:layashrosha|layashrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:golayashnkrosha|golayashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokilayashrosha|gokilayashrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:layashmusha|layashmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:golayashnkmusha|golayashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilayashmusha|gokilayashmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:layashsherasha|layashsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:golayashnksherasha|golayashnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokilayashsherasha|gokilayashsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:layashngasha|layashngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:golayashnkngasha|golayashnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokilayashngasha|gokilayashngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:layashyasha|layashyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:golayashnkyasha|golayashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokilayashyasha|gokilayashyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:layashyamasha|layashyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:golayashnkyamasha|golayashnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokilayashyamasha|gokilayashyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:layashnüshësha|layashnüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:golayashnknüshësha|golayashnknüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokilayashnüshësha|gokilayashnüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:layashnürosha|layashnürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golayashnknürosha|golayashnknürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokilayashnürosha|gokilayashnürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:layashnümusha|layashnümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golayashnknümusha|golayashnknümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilayashnümusha|gokilayashnümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:layashshënüsha|layashshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:golayashnkshënüsha|golayashnkshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokilayashshënüsha|gokilayashshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:layashshërosha|layashshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golayashnkshërosha|golayashnkshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokilayashshërosha|gokilayashshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:layashshëmusha|layashshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golayashnkshëmusha|golayashnkshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilayashshëmusha|gokilayashshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:layashronüsha|layashronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:golayashnkronüsha|golayashnkronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokilayashronüsha|gokilayashronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:layashroshësha|layashroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:golayashnkroshësha|golayashnkroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokilayashroshësha|gokilayashroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:layashromusha|layashromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golayashnkromusha|golayashnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilayashromusha|gokilayashromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:layashmunüsha|layashmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:golayashnkmunüsha|golayashnkmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokilayashmunüsha|gokilayashmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:layashmushësha|layashmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:golayashnkmushësha|golayashnkmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokilayashmushësha|gokilayashmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:layashmurosha|layashmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golayashnkmurosha|golayashnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokilayashmurosha|gokilayashmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:layash|layash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:læyæsh|læyæsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:holayash|holayash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:holæyæsh|holæyæsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hoholayash|hoholayash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hoholæyæsh|hoholæyæsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nülayash|nülayash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nülæyæsh|nülæyæsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nünülayash|nünülayash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nünülæyæsh|nünülæyæsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nïlayash|nïlayash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nïlæyæsh|nïlæyæsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nïnïlayash|nïnïlayash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nïnïlæyæsh|nïnïlæyæsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lulayash|lulayash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lulæyæsh|lulæyæsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lululayash|lululayash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lululæyæsh|lululæyæsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lilayash|lilayash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lilæyæsh|lilæyæsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lililayash|lililayash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lililæyæsh|lililæyæsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kolayash|kolayash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kolæyæsh|kolæyæsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokolayash|kokolayash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokolæyæsh|kokolæyæsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kelayash|kelayash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kelæyæsh|kelæyæsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekelayash|kekelayash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekelæyæsh|kekelæyæsh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
